name: flow
description: Opinionated multi-step development workflow: prep -> research -> plan -> plan-review -> develop -> deploy -> code-review. Atomic commits, TDD-first, multi-LLM review.

interface.shortDescription: Multi-step development workflow with planning, TDD, deploy, and review.
interface.longDescription: Council Flow provides an opinionated development workflow: prep, research, plan, plan-review, develop, deploy, and code-review. It emphasizes isolated worktrees, atomic conventional commits, TDD where practical, Korean user-facing summaries, and multi-LLM review loops.
defaultPrompt: Run the Council Flow workflow for this task.
Create a Council Flow plan for this change.
Review this change with Council Flow.
